openprism.comment: Zero-setup launch via uvx (needs `uv` installed). Runs the opencode backend by default — set OPENPRISM_BACKEND=direct + provider keys here for standalone use. SECURITY: pin a release by appending @<tag> to the git URL (e.g. ...openprism@v0.1.0) so a launch can't pull an unreviewed default branch — `openprism init --host claude-code --ref v0.1.0` generates a pinned block. For local dev: openprism init --host claude-code --local --write
